action: Remove unused blake3 and tokmd-content test dependencies from tokmd-analysis

cargo-machete output identifying unused dependencies blake3 and tokmd-content in tokmd-analysis

current:   /app/crates/tokmd/tests/data/Cargo.toml
workspace: /app/Cargo.toml

this may be fixable by adding `crates/tokmd/tests/data` to the `workspace.members` array of the manifest located at: /app/Cargo.toml
Alternatively, to keep it out of the workspace, add the package to the `workspace.exclude` array, or add an empty `[workspace]` table to the package's manifest.
